from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\('config/.env'\)
import importlib, warnings
warnings.filterwarnings\('ignore'\)

modules = [
    \('src.auth.login', 'auth/login'\),
    \('src.auth.user_db', 'auth/user_db'\),
    \('src.auth.jwt_utils', 'auth/jwt_utils'\),
    \('src.auth.session_manager', 'auth/session_manager'\),
    \('src.chatbot.app', 'chatbot/app'\),
    \('src.chatbot.agent', 'chatbot/agent'\),
    \('src.chatbot.chat_db', 'chatbot/chat_db'\),
    \('src.chatbot.telegram_bot', 'chatbot/telegram_bot'\),
    \('src.mail.summarizer', 'mail/summarizer'\),
    \('src.meeting.reservation_api', 'meeting/reservation_api'\),
    \('src.approval.approval_automation', 'approval/approval_automation'\),
    \('src.approval.form_templates', 'approval/form_templates'\),
    \('src.approval.budget_helpers', 'approval/budget_helpers'\),
    \('src.notion.client', 'notion/client'\),
]
results = []
for mod, label in modules:
    try:
        importlib.import_module\(mod\)
        results.append\(f'  [OK]   {label}'\)
    except Exception as e:
        results.append\(f'  [FAIL] {label} — {e}'\)

print\('=== 모듈 Import 테스트 \(Python 3.12\) ==='\)
for r in results:
    print\(r\)
ok = sum\(1 for r in results if '[OK]' in r\)
fail = sum\(1 for r in results if '[FAIL]' in r\)
print\(f'\\n결과: {ok}/{len\(results\)} OK, {fail} FAIL'\)
" 2>&1)

from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\('config/.env'\)
import importlib, warnings
warnings.filterwarnings\('ignore'\)

modules = [
    \('src.auth.login', 'auth/login'\),
    \('src.auth.user_db', 'auth/user_db'\),
    \('src.auth.jwt_utils', 'auth/jwt_utils'\),
    \('src.auth.session_manager', 'auth/session_manager'\),
    \('src.chatbot.app', 'chatbot/app'\),
    \('src.chatbot.agent', 'chatbot/agent'\),
    \('src.chatbot.chat_db', 'chatbot/chat_db'\),
    \('src.chatbot.telegram_bot', 'chatbot/telegram_bot'\),
    \('src.mail.summarizer', 'mail/summarizer'\),
    \('src.meeting.reservation_api', 'meeting/reservation_api'\),
    \('src.approval.approval_automation', 'approval/approval_automation'\),
    \('src.approval.form_templates', 'approval/form_templates'\),
    \('src.approval.budget_helpers', 'approval/budget_helpers'\),
    \('src.notion.client', 'notion/client'\),
]
results = []
for mod, label in modules:
    try:
        importlib.import_module\(mod\)
        results.append\(f'  [OK]   {label}'\)
    except Exception as e:
        results.append\(f'  [FAIL] {label} — {e}'\)

print\('=== 모듈 Import 테스트 \(Python 3.12\) ==='\)
for r in results:
    print\(r\)
ok = sum\(1 for r in results if '[OK]' in r\)
print\(f'\\n결과: {ok}/{len\(results\)} OK'\)
" 2>&1)

import asyncio, os, warnings, time
warnings.filterwarnings\('ignore'\)
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\('config/.env'\)
from src.chatbot.agent import analyze_and_route

print\('=== T9: 챗봇 라우팅 \(Gemini\) ==='\)
t0 = time.time\(\)
try:
    result = asyncio.run\(analyze_and_route\(
        user_message='안녕하세요, 테스트입니다.',
        user_context={'gw_id': os.getenv\('GW_USER_ID', 'test'\)},
    \)\)
    assert isinstance\(result, dict\), 'dict가 아님'
    assert 'response' in result, 'response 키 없음'
    print\(f'  [OK] 응답 길이: {len\(result.get\(\\"response\\", \\"\\"\)\)}자 \({time.time\(\)-t0:.1f}s\)'\)
    print\(f'  응답 미리보기: {result[\\"response\\"][:80]}...'\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f'  [FAIL] {e} \({time.time\(\)-t0:.1f}s\)'\)
" 2>&1)

import asyncio, os, warnings, time
warnings.filterwarnings\('ignore'\)
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\('config/.env'\)
from src.chatbot.agent import analyze_and_route

print\('=== T11: 챗봇 자연어 예약 취소 라우팅 ==='\)
t0 = time.time\(\)
try:
    result = asyncio.run\(analyze_and_route\(
        user_message='내일 예약 취소하고 싶어',
        user_context={'gw_id': os.getenv\('GW_USER_ID', 'test'\)},
    \)\)
    assert isinstance\(result, dict\)
    assert 'response' in result
    print\(f'  [OK] action={result.get\(\\"action\\", \\"N/A\\"\)} \({time.time\(\)-t0:.1f}s\)'\)
    print\(f'  응답: {result[\\"response\\"][:100]}'\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f'  [FAIL] {e} \({time.time\(\)-t0:.1f}s\)'\)

print\(\)
print\('=== T12: 챗봇 다중 턴 대화 ==='\)
t0 = time.time\(\)
try:
    history = []
    turns = ['내일 예약 취소하고 싶어', '취소테스트 취소해줘', '내일 예약 현황 보여줘']
    for i, msg in enumerate\(turns, 1\):
        result = asyncio.run\(analyze_and_route\(
            user_message=msg,
            user_context={'gw_id': os.getenv\('GW_USER_ID', 'test'\)},
            conversation_history=history,
        \)\)
        assert isinstance\(result, dict\), f'턴 {i}: dict가 아님'
        assert 'response' in result, f'턴 {i}: response 없음'
        history.append\({'role': 'user', 'content': msg}\)
        history.append\({'role': 'assistant', 'content': result['response']}\)
        print\(f'  턴 {i}: action={result.get\(\\"action\\", \\"N/A\\"\)} / {len\(result[\\"response\\"]\)}자'\)
    
    assert len\(history\) == 6, f'히스토리 길이 {len\(history\)} != 6'
    print\(f'  [OK] 3턴 대화 완료 \({time.time\(\)-t0:.1f}s\)'\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f'  [FAIL] {e} \({time.time\(\)-t0:.1f}s\)'\)
" 2>&1)
